brand.name: Re:Chord
brand.tagline: From the music you listen to, to the music you play
brand.subtitle: re·record · re·chord

landing.hero_line1: From the music you listen to,
landing.hero_lead: One link gives you vocal separation, key/tempo control, chord and section analysis, lyrics and score generation, beat cues and loop practice — one screen that
landing.spec_model_value: MDX23C · BS-Roformer · htdemucs · MelBand Kim V2
landing.showcase_label: live waveform · 4-model ensemble + karaoke post · polish
landing.features_subtitle: Live performance · studio separation · practice — workflows that usually live in different tools, brought into a single flow.
landing.feature_sep_desc: MDX23C · BS-Roformer · htdemucs · MelBand Kim V2 — four-model fusion with residual cleanup.
landing.feature_keytempo_desc: Rubber Band R3 finer engine. Per-stem presets keep transients natural.
landing.feature_stems_desc: Vocals · drums · bass · guitar · piano · other. Pick any combo, instant download.
landing.feature_score_desc: MIDI · MusicXML · PDF. Vocal lead sheet, piano grand staff, guitar/bass TAB, drum percussion clef, choir SATB — per-stem notation auto-picked.
landing.feature_cue_desc: Beat-aligned "verse 1, 2, 3, 4" voice cues. Separate monitor track export.
landing.feature_loop_desc: Bar-snap loop + count-in. Drill the tough bits forever.
landing.feature_slow_desc: 0.5× / 0.75× playback with pitch preserved. Ideal for solo transcription.
landing.feature_chord_desc: Beat-synchronised chord progression + structural labels. Click to jump anywhere.
landing.workflow_subtitle: Designed with fewer decisions. New users only need to pick a mode.
landing.step1_desc: Paste a URL or drop a file.
landing.step1_b2: Almost any format: wav · mp3 · m4a · flac · mp4 …
landing.step2_b1: Quick MR : strip vocals only, fast
landing.step2_b2: Karaoke · Stems · Pro : chords / score / multi-stem
landing.step3_desc: Defaults are great — expand to fine-tune.
landing.step3_b1: Key · tempo · voice cues · click track
landing.step3_b2: Score style · lyrics domain · polish strength
landing.step4_desc: Every output in one result screen.
landing.step4_b1: Waveform + A/B loop + bar snap + slow play
landing.compare_subtitle: You usually needed separate tools for live, separation and practice. Here, a single separation feeds them all on the same screen.
landing.compare_footer: Everything derives from one separation run. No copying work back and forth between tools.
landing.domain_live_desc: Built for stage, worship and jam sessions.
landing.domain_live_b2: Detected-BPM click track as a separate export
landing.domain_live_b3: Strip only the lead vocal, keep backing/harmonies
landing.domain_studio_b4: WAV / FLAC / AIFF up to 96 kHz · 32-bit float
landing.domain_practice_b4: AI auto score — lead sheet / grand staff / guitar+bass TAB / drum / SATB
landing.final_cta_title_tail: and other tools start to feel busy.
landing.final_cta_subtitle: Paste a URL or drop a file. Pick a mode. First result in under 30 seconds.

home.hero_subtitle: Paste a URL or drop a file and pick a mode. Advanced options open only when you need them.
home.cta_idle: Paste a URL or upload a file.
home.regen_banner_with_source: Settings from '{{title}}' are pre-filled. Just re-attach the source file or URL.
home.regen_banner_no_source: Settings are pre-filled. Just re-attach the source file or URL.
home.ar_def: All Recorded — original track with vocals + accompaniment
home.mr_def: Music Recorded — accompaniment only, vocals removed
home.opt_keytempo_hint: Leave alone to keep the original.
home.opt_perf_hint: Section voice cues · click track · keep backing vocals
home.opt_score_hint: Lead sheet / grand staff / guitar+bass TAB / drum / SATB — per-stem auto
home.opt_lyrics_hint: faster-whisper · per-word confidence. AI assists; you confirm.
home.polish_amb_hint: Restores some of the room tone / tails removed with the vocal, and flattens dynamics.
home.polish_reverb_hint: Envelope-aware restoration of the reverb tail lost with the vocal stem. 80% → 90% natural.
home.perf_cue_hint: On-beat voice cues for upcoming sections ("verse 1, 2, 3, 4 ─").
home.perf_click_hint: Wood-block tone mixed into the monitor track at the detected BPM.
home.perf_backing_hint: Strip only the lead vocal; keep BGV / choir on the instrumental (worship / choir teams).
home.score_toggle_hint: Vocals → lead sheet, piano → grand staff, guitar/bass → TAB, drums → percussion clef, choir → SATB. Per-stem notation is auto-picked; override per stem if needed.
home.score_stems_help: Vocals (melody) is the most accurate. Drums/guitar/bass only activate in Stems mode. Notation auto-picks per stem (drums → drum clef, guitar → TAB).
home.score_per_stem_help: Leave blank to let each stem pick its natural notation.
home.lyrics_toggle_title: 🎤 Extract lyrics from the vocal stem
home.lyrics_toggle_hint: Saves lyrics.json with per-word timing and confidence. Edit on the result page and re-render the score.
home.lyrics_domain_help1: Example: the same pronunciation might be written one way in a worship setting and another way in pop.
home.lyrics_domain_help2: Domain priming nudges the model; you still review the result.
home.pro_hint: Separator ensemble · stereo handling · meter override
home.pro_models_help: SOTA weights activate after `python scripts/fetch_sota_separator.py`. Selecting a model you haven't fetched will fail the job.
home.pro_diff_hint: Compares against vocal spectrogram and masks residual leakage one more time (−3~6 dB).

notation.lead_sheet_hint: Melody + chords + lyrics (worship · K-pop · jazz standard)

keyctl.title: Key
keyctl.artefact_warn: Beyond ±5 semitones you may notice minor artefacts.

tempo.title: Tempo
tempo.warn: Past ±25% you may notice subtle transient / spatial shifts.

submit.url_placeholder: YouTube, Instagram, SoundCloud, TikTok ... almost any media URL
submit.drop_or_click: Drag and drop, or click to choose a file
submit.accepted_formats: wav · aiff · flac · mp3 · m4a · ogg · opus · mp4 · mov · mkv · webm and almost any other format

format.upsample_note1: Outputs at a higher sample rate than the source (upsample via soxr).
format.upsample_note2: No new information is added — this just matches the delivery / studio standard.

progress.ws_failed: Lost connection to the server. Please refresh.

setlist_warn.min_two: Add 2+ songs to auto-check key/BPM jumps.

library.title: Library
library.setlists_empty: None yet. Use to group songs for worship sets / concerts.
library.perform_with_setlist: Start Performance mode with this setlist
library.history_empty_hint: Your first conversion will appear here automatically.

result.regenerate_tooltip: Start a new conversion with this song's settings (you'll re-attach the source)
result.downloads_tip: Tip: in Chrome/Edge the download buttons open a folder picker.
result.empty_playable_hint: Instrumental / vocals appear here once the job completes.
result.empty_stems_hint: Start a new job in 'Stems' mode to pull individual instrument tracks.
result.empty_score_hint: Enable 'Make score' or 'Lyrics transcription' when you start a job.
result.empty_master_hint: Once a job finishes, LUFS normalization · Auto-tune · worship pedal-tones · Segue all activate here.
result.empty_quality_hint: When a job finishes, null-test-based separation quality metrics appear here.
result.key_tooltip: essentia-based key detection. Honest limit: modal / jazz hovers at 60-70 %.
result.bpm_tooltip: librosa beat track. Variable-tempo tracks may be less accurate.
result.dl_tip: Tip: in Chrome/Edge the download buttons open a folder picker. Monitor track (voice cue + click) is available on the Play / Compare tab above.
result.key_planner_hint: Suggested key from the vocal range. Set your team's range to get a key that fits your team. Apply it via “Regenerate”.

perform.empty_setlist: Setlist is empty or the job could not be found.
perform.midi_active: MIDI foot-switch active — {{count}} device(s) (CC64 = play, CC67 = next, PC = next section)

error_card.private_hint: Videos / audio that require sign-in cannot be downloaded.
error_card.private_step2: Or download the source file and use upload mode instead.
error_card.network_hint: Connection to the source host dropped — likely transient.
error_card.network_step2: If on a corporate/school network, a firewall may be blocking it.
error_card.gpu_hint: Track length × model combo doesn't fit into 8 GB VRAM.
error_card.gpu_step1: Lower the mode: Pro → Karaoke or Quick MR.
error_card.gpu_step2: Cut tracks longer than 5 minutes before uploading.
error_card.format_hint: File may be corrupted or in a format ffmpeg doesn't support.
error_card.format_step1: Re-save the source as WAV/FLAC/MP3 and upload again.
error_card.format_step2: DRM-protected files (Apple Music, Melon downloads…) aren't supported.
error_card.extractor_hint: yt-dlp could not pull audio from this site.
error_card.extractor_step1: Try a different mirror or another upload of the same song.
error_card.extractor_step2: Content may also be geo-blocked in your region.
error_card.generic_hint: We couldn't auto-classify the cause. Retry or try a different input.
error_card.generic_step1: Retry with the same input (may be transient).
error_card.generic_step2: If it repeats, lower the mode one step.

errors.boundary_hint: Refresh the page or go back to home.

auth.phase_a_body: During beta you can use every feature without signing in. Kakao login + consent flow activates at launch.
auth.login_subtitle: AI vocal separation · key / tempo / chord / score analysis. One-second start with Kakao.
auth.supabase_unset: Supabase is not configured (set VITE_SUPABASE_URL / ANON_KEY in .env).
auth.agreement_notice: By signing up you agree to the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy> (review on the next screen).
auth.callback_loading_body: Handing off the Kakao session to the consent screen.
auth.callback_no_session: No session received from the provider
auth.consent_subtitle: Please confirm and agree to the items below for honest use. Required items are mandated by Korea's PIPA.
auth.consent_footer: You can change or withdraw any consent on My Page at any time.
auth.consent_login_required: Sign in to see the consent screen.
auth.consent_label_tos: Agree to the Terms of Service
auth.consent_label_intl_transfer: Agree to international transfer of personal info
auth.consent_label_copyright_self_desc: I confirm that I hold legitimate rights to any audio I upload.

onboarding.step1_body: From a URL or a file, do everything from vocal separation to score generation on one screen.
onboarding.step2_body: Quick MR · Karaoke · Stems · Pro — each mode configures separation, analysis and export automatically.
onboarding.step3_body: Play / Stems / Score / Mastering / Quality — five tabs surface every output of the conversion.
onboarding.step4_body: On stage, use the giant chord readout · transpose presets · count-in · voice cues.

share.title: Share link
share.embed_hint: Embed this job in another page (no header).
share.link_hint: Direct link to this job's result page.

monitor.title: Monitor track
monitor.subtitle: Voice cues + click mixed into a separate monitor track
monitor.missing: No monitor track — enable the option when you start a job.

recording.title: Recording
recording.ready_hint: Sing over the MR to make a demo.

ab.title: Listening compare
ab.explain_tooltip: All three tracks play simultaneously from the same position. Toggle chips to choose which to hear. Instantly verifies whether separation actually worked.
ab.hint: 💡 Toggling reveals exactly the same position in a different version — the most intuitive way to compare leakage / quality.

common2.edit_and_save_hint: Edit and save; the score regenerates automatically.
common2.rebuild_score_for_vocals_hint: Edit and save; the vocals score regenerates automatically.

aux2.title: AUX patch cues (second keyboard)
aux2.estimate_tooltip: Uses CLAP + an open-source reference DB to auto-estimate keyboard patches per bar from the instrumental.
aux2.no_cues_yet: No cues yet. Add one by entering a bar range and a patch name.
aux2.hint: 💡 In worship / live use, the second keyboard (AUX) usually carries a different patch (pad / strings…) to set atmosphere. Annotate it per bar.

lyrics_panel2.title: Lyrics (AI auto · human-verified)
lyrics_panel2.low_count: {{count}} words below 60% confidence — highlighted in red. Please review.
lyrics_panel2.add_verse_title: Add another verse using the same melody
lyrics_panel2.translation_placeholder: e.g. natural Korean translation for English lyrics, or vice versa.
lyrics_panel2.hint: 💡 What we hear isn't always literal. A quick pass over the AI's words turns same-confidence into much more natural reading.

lyrics_empty.title: No lyrics yet
lyrics_empty.hint: Enable "🎤 Lyrics auto-transcribe" when you start a job to review and edit word-by-word here.

chords_panel.no_chords_hint: Karaoke / Pro modes run this automatically. A standalone trigger will land later.
chords_panel.title: Chord progression

sections2.no_sections_hint: Enable "🎙️ Section voice cues" or "🥁 Click track" to also run section analysis.
sections2.title: Section timeline
sections2.click_hint: Click to jump to a section. Auto-labelling lands around 70–80 % accuracy.

monitor2.title: Practice / live track
monitor2.monitor_sub: Instrumental + voice cues + click mixed for an in-ear monitor
monitor2.click_sub: Metronome track aligned exactly to detected beats/downbeats
monitor2.hint: ✨ Voice cues say "verse one, two, three, four" right before each section enters — less memorisation pressure on stage.

notes2.title: Rehearsal notes
notes2.placeholder: e.g. "1-bar rest before chorus" / "this section is OK +2 key"

onboarding2.step1_body: Paste a YouTube/Vimeo URL or drop a local audio/video file. Almost every format works.
onboarding2.step2_body: Quick MR (fast instrumental), Karaoke (with chord/section analysis), Stems (per-instrument), Pro (model picking). The mode alone already gives great results.
onboarding2.step3_title: 3) Start — options only if you need them
onboarding2.step3_body: Defaults work great. Key ±, tempo %, output format, voice cues, click track — open Options to tweak.
onboarding2.title: Re:Chord — quick tour

practice2.title: Layered practice
practice2.hint: Difficulty increases left → right. Listen with just the click first to learn the song, then turn up vocal · MR · monitor channels one at a time.

quality2.title: Separation quality (null test)
quality2.stat_band_hint: Energy at 300–3400 Hz on the instrumental — smaller = less vocal leakage
quality2.stat_stem_hint: Closer to 0 is better · less leakage between stems
quality2.hint: Not a perfect objective metric — baselines vary by genre/mix. Best used to compare models/modes within the same song.

recording2.unsupported: Browser doesn't support microphone recording, or permission was denied.
recording2.title: Performance recording
recording2.score_title: Compare to the original vocal for pitch / timing score
recording2.hint: 💡 Record with headphones playing the MR so click / cues don't bleed into the take.

share2.title: Share result
share2.phase_a_warning: ⚠️ In Phase A (local-only) this link won't open from outside. Activates once you deploy in Phase B.

shortcuts2.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts2.hint: Tip: shortcuts don't fire while you're typing in an input field.

advexp2.title: Advanced export (5.1 / DSD)
advexp2.surround_hint: In Stems mode the 6-stem split gives the cleanest spatialisation. Native Atmos mux is coming.
advexp2.dsd_hint: Will fail if your ffmpeg build lacks the DSD encoder. The BtbN nightly build is recommended.

autotune2.title: Vocal pitch correction (Auto-tune lite)
autotune2.subtitle: CREPE + WORLD · formant-preserving
autotune2.window_hint: Only pitches within this window (cents) are corrected. Narrow = natural, wide = catches more.
autotune2.hint: 💡 Pop / K-pop: 65 %. Classical / jazz: 30–40 %. Live vocals: 70 %+ for stability.

mastering2.title: Mastering (LUFS + EQ)
mastering2.subtitle: Platform loudness normalization + tonal balance
mastering2.eq_hint: All zero = EQ step is skipped (no extra processing).

worship2.title: Worship mode
worship2.subtitle: Pedal-tone · song-to-song segue
worship2.segue_help: You need at least one other song in the library to create a segue.
worship2.hint: 💡 Pedal-tone is great for prayer pads / modulation bridges. Segue works smoothly when BPMs match; flip BPM auto-match if they're far apart.

stems_mix2.hint: Tip: you only need to separate once. The same stem set produces unlimited mixdowns instantly.

wave2.title: Waveform + section loop
wave2.hint: Tip: looping the hard parts in slow-listen mode trains fingers and ears fast. Count-in helps rehearse stage entries too.

score_panel2.title: Score (AI auto-transcribe)
score_panel2.explain: Per-stem notation is auto-picked — vocals as lead sheet (chords + lyrics), piano / other as grand staff, guitar as 6-line TAB, bass as 4-line TAB, drums as 5-piece percussion clef (kick / snare / HH / ride / crash), choir as SATB four-part. Every score also carries: ♩ = BPM tempo top-left, chord symbols above the staff, and section markers (Intro / Verse / Chorus / Bridge…) at bar heads. Score generation only happens in Stems / Pro mode (Quick MR / Karaoke only generate the vocal score). Auto-transcription accuracy: vocal melody 80–85 %, TAB / drums 70–80 %. MusicXML opens directly in MuseScore / Sibelius for editing.
score_panel2.svg_sub: Browser print or embed as image

library_page2.title: Job library
library_page2.subtitle: Jobs and setlists you've run on this device. Click a job to open its result page.

stems_mix.title: Stems Mixer
stems_mix.subtitle: Toggle stems on/off and download a mixdown

lyrics_panel.title: Lyrics edit
lyrics_panel.untranscribed: No transcribed lyrics. Enable 'Lyrics auto-transcribe' when you start a job.
lyrics_panel.low_conf_threshold: Highlight words below 60% confidence with a red underline

aux.title: AUX patch cues
aux.subtitle: Annotate keyboard patches per bar range (organ / pad / strings)
aux.no_cues: No cues yet — add one by entering a bar range and a patch name.

quality_panel.title: Quality report
quality_panel.hint: Lower Null RMS · higher Recon corr = cleaner separation

autotune.title: Auto-tune
autotune.subtitle: Pitch-correct the vocal stem against the key/scale

worship.title: Worship tools
worship.subtitle: Extra processing for worship / live use
worship.pedal_hint: Adds N bars of pedal-tone (sustained chord) at the end — perfect for natural segues.
worship.segue_hint: Seamlessly continues into the next song of the setlist (when BPMs match).
worship.modulate_hint: Lift the final chorus by ½ or 1 semitone for the climax.

export_panel.title: Advanced export
export_panel.subtitle: 5.1 surround / binaural / DSD and other specialised formats
export_panel.dsd_hint: High-resolution SACD format. Requires ffmpeg with the dsd_lsbf_planar encoder.
export_panel.dsd_unsupported: This ffmpeg build doesn't support DSD encoding.

chords.title: Chord progression
chords.subtitle: Beat-synced chords · click to jump to that bar
chords.no_chords: No chord analysis — re-run in Karaoke / Pro mode.

sections_panel.title: Section structure
sections_panel.subtitle: Intro / verse / chorus / bridge etc.
sections_panel.no_sections: No section analysis — re-run in Karaoke / Pro mode.

library_page.title: Library
library_page.subtitle: Recent jobs · setlist management
library_page.empty: No jobs yet. Start your first conversion.

boundary.title: Unexpected error
boundary.body: Couldn't render this screen. The error was logged to the console.

chat.title: Re:Chord assistant
chat.placeholder: Ask about songs, lyrics, key, tempo…
chat.empty_hint: Ask about a worship song, paste a YouTube link, or speak Korean worship lyrics to identify a song.
chat.translation_warning: AI reference · not an official translation
chat.no_conversations: No conversations yet. Click "New chat" to start.
chat.delete_confirm: Delete this conversation? This cannot be undone.

backend2.title: Backends used / accuracy confidence
backend2.subtitle: Models that actually ran at each stage
backend2.fallback_notice: Some stages ran on a fallback path
backend2.footer: Each output's accuracy depends on the model that actually ran at each stage above. Fallback paths are typically 5-15% less accurate than SOTA.

feedback2.title: Result feedback
feedback2.subtitle: Goes straight into accuracy improvements
feedback2.cat_separation_hint: Are vocals and accompaniment cleanly split?
feedback2.cat_score_hint: Are pitch, rhythm, and dynamics correct?
feedback2.cat_chords_hint: Are the progression and tensions right?
feedback2.cat_lyrics_hint: Are the words and timing correct?
feedback2.cat_timing_hint: Are BPM detection and the beat grid right?
feedback2.notes_placeholder: Tell us what worked well and what fell short
feedback2.need_input: Rate at least one category or write a comment
feedback2.thank_you_detail: It feeds straight into accuracy work. You can always submit more.

accuracy_guide.title: Accuracy guide
accuracy_guide.intro: Some separation/analysis/score stages are running on fallback backends. Installing the packages below meaningfully improves accuracy for those stages. For a commercial deployment we recommend installing all of them.
accuracy_guide.footer: Restart the backend after installing and it will auto-detect. The 'Backends used' panel on the result page shows which stages run at SOTA.
accuracy_guide.all_installed_detail: Chords (170-class), CNN key detection, polyphonic piano, bass CREPE, madmom downbeats - all available. Converting at maximum accuracy.
